name: Juan Manuel Fangio
notes: The Maestro. Nurburgring '57 is considered the greatest drive ever.

name: Jim Clark
notes: Perhaps the most naturally gifted driver ever. Smooth as silk.

name: Jackie Stewart
notes: The Flying Scot. Precision, control, and unmatched professionalism for his era.

name: Clay Regazzoni
notes: Competitivo e agressivo, mas com maior risco.

name: Emerson Fittipaldi
notes: Smart, controlled champion of the early 1970s with excellent race management.

name: Niki Lauda
notes: Won the title post-Nurburgring crash through sheer calculation and testing.

name: Mario Andretti
notes: Versatile world champion with strong adaptability and a very complete historical profile.

name: Gilles Villeneuve
notes: Spectacular raw speed and overtaking, but high risk and lower consistency defined the profile.

name: Didier Pironi
notes: Rápido e competitivo, mas com altíssimo risco político para dinâmica interna.

name: Eddie Cheever
notes: Piloto de suporte com utilidade moderada, mas sem impacto comparável aos melhores segundos pilotos.

name: Nelson Piquet
notes: Won the title by outsmarting Prost. Highly technical driver.

name: Michele Alboreto
notes: Piloto forte e equilibrado, útil para campanhas de construtores.

name: Alain Prost
notes: The Professor. Won the title in an inferior car through sheer intelligence and consistency.

name: Ayrton Senna
notes: Peak qualifying speed, intense aggression.

name: Thierry Boutsen
notes: Muito consistente, bom em chuva e excelente para estabilidade de equipe.

name: Gerhard Berger
notes: Solid secondary driver.

name: Ayrton Senna
notes: More mature, complete version of Senna. Held off Mansell in a superior Williams.

name: Gerhard Berger
notes: Fast but inconsistent, heavily overshadowed by Senna.

name: Nigel Mansell
notes: Dominated 1992. Incredible bravery and physical strength to drive the FW14B.

name: Riccardo Patrese
notes: Solid secondary driver.

name: Alain Prost
notes: Cruised to his 4th title in the dominant Williams. Disliked the active suspension feel but mastered it.

name: Jean Alesi
notes: Muito talentoso e combativo, bom em chuva, mas irregular e com alto risco.

name: Michael Schumacher
notes: Relentless pace, capable of driving around a notoriously difficult B195.

name: Damon Hill
notes: Methodical champion whose strengths came from composure, consistency, and race control.

name: Olivier Panis
notes: Útil em condições caóticas e de chuva, mas limitado frente aos melhores.

name: Jacques Villeneuve
notes: Strong qualifier and racer in a narrow window, but less complete than the all-time S-tier stars.

name: David Coulthard
notes: Solid, dependable number two for Hakkinen.

name: Mika Hakkinen
notes: The Flying Finn. The only driver Schumacher truly feared.

name: Eddie Irvine
notes: Solid secondary driver.

name: Eddie Irvine
notes: Thrust into a title fight after Schumacher broke his leg. Almost won it.

name: Heinz-Harald Frentzen
notes: Temporada extremamente forte pela Jordan, bom ritmo e consistência.

name: Mika Hakkinen
notes: The Flying Finn at his mature peak: ultra-fast, calm, and highly race-credible.

name: David Coulthard
notes: Solid secondary driver.

name: Michael Schumacher
notes: Absolute perfection. Podium in every race.

name: Rubens Barrichello
notes: A fantastic driver who sacrificed his legacy to be Schumacher's wingman.

name: Juan Pablo Montoya
notes: Explosive overtaker with elite racecraft, but a more volatile profile than the most complete champions.

name: Ralf Schumacher
notes: Solid secondary driver.

name: Jarno Trulli
notes: Solid secondary driver.

name: Rubens Barrichello
notes: Solid secondary driver.

name: Giancarlo Fisichella
notes: Solid secondary driver.

name: Kimi Raikkonen
notes: Blisteringly fast. Robbed of the title by Mercedes engine failures.

name: Fernando Alonso
notes: Beat Schumacher in a straight fight. Unbelievably consistent and relentless.

name: Nick Heidfeld
notes: Muito consistente, bom para construtores e com baixo risco.

name: Felipe Massa
notes: Solid secondary driver.

name: Felipe Massa
notes: Champion for 30 seconds. Brilliant in 2008.

name: Lewis Hamilton
notes: Raw, blistering pace. Made mistakes but made up for them with insane speed.

name: Robert Kubica
notes: Piloto muito completo, consistente e eficiente em 2008.

name: Jenson Button
notes: Won 6 of the first 7 races. Super smooth, great in changing conditions.

name: Mark Webber
notes: Solid secondary driver.

name: Mark Webber
notes: Led the championship going into the finale, but lost to his teammate.

name: Sebastian Vettel
notes: The master of the blown diffuser. Unbeatable in qualifying.

name: Fernando Alonso
notes: Widely considered one of the greatest seasons by any driver in history, despite losing.

name: Daniel Ricciardo
notes: Destroyed reigning champion Vettel and took 3 wins in the Mercedes era.

name: Nico Rosberg
notes: Threw everything into 2016 to beat one of the GOATs, then retired.

name: Valtteri Bottas
notes: Solid secondary driver.

name: Lewis Hamilton
notes: The complete package. Incredibly fast, consistent, and flawless tire management.

name: Valtteri Bottas
notes: Incredible qualifier, but lacked the race pace and aggression of Lewis.

name: Max Verstappen
notes: Absolute peak aggression and raw speed to fight Mercedes.

name: Sergio Perez
notes: Crucial team player in the 2021 finale.

name: Carlos Sainz
notes: Smart, analytical driver. Matched Leclerc occasionally.

name: Charles Leclerc
notes: Generational qualifying speed. Costly errors hurt his title challenge.

name: George Russell
notes: Forte em classificação e ritmo, mas ainda em fase de afirmação e com hierarquia interna potencialmente delicada.

name: Carlos Sainz
notes: Solid secondary driver.

name: Max Verstappen
notes: The most statistically dominant season by a driver ever. Flawless.

name: Sergio Perez
notes: Solid secondary driver.

name: Lando Norris
notes: Blistering pace, but struggled with starts and pressure early in title fights.
